prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `dc2aa30b`.
codex_response:
Implemented `dc2aa30b` as a new ARC2 task package. The rule is: split the 11x11 grid into nine 3x3 tiles using the zero separators, sort tiles by increasing count of color `2`, then place them back right-to-left within each row. I used the `arc2_opus46_summary.json` hint as a starting hypothesis and discarded the `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` hint because its claimed band rotation and `1`/`2` swap do not match the official examples; that correction is documented in [notes.md](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_dc2aa30b/notes.md#L1).

The verifier is in [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_dc2aa30b/verifier.py#L6), shared tile split/assembly helpers are in [helpers.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_dc2aa30b/helpers.py#L4), the generator is in [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_dc2aa30b/generator.py#L10), and task wiring is in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_dc2aa30b/__init__.py#L1). No new primitive was needed, so `arc2/dsl_ext.py` was unchanged.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `4/4`, generated examples `1000/1000`, and the preview sheet looks on-distribution. Artifacts are at [task.json](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/dc2aa30b/task.json), [originals.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/dc2aa30b/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/dc2aa30b/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/dc2aa30b/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/dc2aa30b/previews/preview_03.png).
